sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ حَمْدِيٌّ بَائِعًا فِي سُوقٍ شَعْبِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Hamdi radi kao prodavač na pijaci.
sentences.translationEn: Hamdi works as a seller in a popular market.

sentences.arabic: يَعْرِضُ الْخُضَرَ وَالْفَاكِهَةَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ مِنَ الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan od jutra izlaže povrće i voće.
sentences.translationEn: He displays vegetables and fruit every day from the morning.

sentences.arabic: يُنَادِي بِأَسْعَارِهِ بِصَوْتٍ قَوِيٍّ لِيَجْذِبَ الزَّبَائِنَ.
sentences.translation: Viče cijene jakim glasom da privuče kupce.
sentences.translationEn: He calls out his prices in a loud voice to attract customers.

sentences.arabic: يَبِيعُ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ قَبْلَ الظُّهْرِ فِي أَيَّامِ الذُّرْوَةِ.
sentences.translation: Proda sve prije podneva u vršnim danima.
sentences.translationEn: He sells everything before noon on peak days.
